evals.prompt: I need fresh App Store screenshots for the v1.10 release. Can you capture them in both light and dark mode?
evals.expected_output: Agent should set up the simulator, configure demo data, capture screenshots for all key screens in both light and dark mode, and save to the correct directories
expectations: The agent checks if the simulator is booted and boots it if needed
The agent builds and installs the app on the simulator
The agent configures demo data via @AppStorage defaults
The agent captures screenshots in both light and dark mode
The agent saves screenshots to docs/assets/screenshots/appstore/
The agent captures at least the Today, Calendar, and Lists screens

evals.prompt: I just need website screenshots updated for the new TodayView design. Dark mode only, just the main screens
evals.expected_output: Agent should focus on website screenshots in dark mode only, saving to the correct website directory with proper naming
expectations: The agent sets appearance to dark mode using xcrun simctl ui
The agent saves to docs/site/assets/screenshots/dark/ (not appstore directory)
The agent uses the correct naming convention ({number}-{feature-name}.png)
The agent only captures in dark mode as requested (not both)
The agent lists the captured files for user review
